heroTitle: CliffRise is a way to give something back to the cliffs that give us so much - with every purchase supporting the creation of new routes and the care of climbing areas in Bulgaria.

dryChalk.name: Chunky Chalk – 250 g
dryChalk.description: Chunky climbing chalk with a coarse structure that breaks down easily and provides reliable friction. Made for bouldering, sport routes and long climbing sessions. Open. Crush. Climb.

wetChalk.name: Moist Chunky Chalk – 250 g
wetChalk.description: Moist chunky climbing chalk with a denser structure that breaks down easily and leaves an even layer on the hands. Made for bouldering, sport routes and long climbing sessions. Open. Crush. Climb.

liquidChalk.name: Liquid Chalk - 250 ml
liquidChalk.description: Liquid chalk that dries quickly and leaves an even layer on the hands. Made for reliable friction both indoors and outdoors.

tshirt.name: T‑Shirt with a Cause
tshirt.description: Comfortable T‑shirt for climbing and for the days between routes. Simple, durable and made for people who love climbing.

hat.name: Beanie with a Cause
hat.description: Warm beanie for cold days in the mountains and in the city. Comfortable, simple and made for climbing adventures.

fingerTape.name: Climbing Tape
fingerTape.description: Durable tape for protecting fingers while climbing. Made for crack climbing, sharp holds and long climbing sessions.

cart.routeFunding: This purchase helps create new climbing routes

eventsSection.normalTextOne: it was a weekend full of climbing, smiles, and time outdoors. Climbing during the day, yoga, and meeting cool people, sharing stories and ideas - all against the backdrop of beautiful Teteven. An event that showcased
eventsSection.boldedTextTwo: how strong and vibrant the climbing community is
eventsSection.normalTextTwo: and left a desire for this to be just the beginning.

contactForm.description1: We develop climbing routes and maintain climbing areas.
contactForm.description2: If you’d like to get involved, support the work, or simply ask a question, write to us and we’ll get back to you.

success.part2: We'll get back to you shortly.
